channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: US Supreme Court scales back Roundup cancer lawsuits in victory for company
item.description: More than 100,000 plaintiffs had filed cases in US state and federal courts alleging cancer link to weedkiller Roundup.

item.title: Ukrainian attack on Crimea kills five, Russian officials say
item.description: Attacks continue on the ground as Moscow expels Romania’s consul general in a tit-for-tat move.

item.title: Pragmatic choice: Israel’s war backfires as Gulf backs US-Iran deal
item.description: A war meant to isolate Iran instead deepened Gulf pragmatism and strengthened support for diplomacy.

item.title: How the HPV vaccine changes how we think about cancer
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Linh Nguyen explains how the HPV vaccine changes the way we think about cancer.

item.title: Venezuela struggles to respond to devastating twin earthquakes
item.description: Noris Soto says authorities appear to lack a clear response plan in the aftermath of two powerful earthquakes.

item.title: Rubio: Gulf countries don’t support Strait of Hormuz tolls
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said all Gulf countries oppose a toll in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Israeli forces shoot and kill Palestinians in occupied West Bank, Gaza
item.description: The deaths come amid escalating Israeli military raids and settler attacks across the occupied territories.

item.title: US Supreme Court paves way for government to block asylum seekers at border
item.description: Liberal justices say the ruling 'circumvents' US law by allowing agents to prevent asylum seekers from filing a claim.

item.title: Escaping Darfur: Mothers face starvation under trees in Chad
item.description: Fleeing scorched earth, Darfur’s mothers share harrowing tales of starvation and survival in Chad.

item.title: Spain vs Uruguay at World Cup 2026: match prediction, knockouts and lineups
item.description: Past winners Uruguay and Spain face off in Guadalajara, battling for top-spot in Group H and a kinder knockout draw.

item.title: They fled war as child refugees, now they’re playing at World Cup 2026
item.description: In a World Cup for everyone, as it has been dubbed by FIFA, players carry historic stories of war and displacement.

item.title: Israel kills three in Lebanon as Rubio praises progress in Washington talks
item.description: Lebanon’s state-run National News Agency reports three people killed after an Israeli attack on a car in Nabatieh.

item.title: Lebanon Latest: Peace talks between Lebanon and Israel, people return south
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Robert McBride brings you the latest from Beirut as people return to the south of Lebanon.

item.title: Iran accuses NATO of ‘complicity’ in US war: What role did EU nations play?
item.description: NATO boss tries to convince Trump that European allies were there for the US during war on Iran.

item.title: IRGC warns against new Hormuz route for ships: What we know
item.description: Experts say disagreements over shipping routes and transit fees could complicate efforts to reach a permanent agreement.

item.title: Iran negotiator Ghalibaf rejects claim unfrozen funds will buy US goods
item.description: The denial contradicts the US administration, which said unfrozen funds will be spent on produce from American farmers.

item.title: UK’s hottest June: ‘The population should have been prepared for this’
item.description: Schools are closing, public transport is slowing and cooling items are flying off shelves as Britons swelter.

item.title: Deconfliction and disarmament: Can both be pursued in Lebanon?
item.description: New deconfliction mechanism seeks to prevent return to all-out war in Lebanon and in the region.

item.title: Norway vs France at World Cup 2026: Mbappe vs Haaland, team news, lineups
item.description: Norway and France face off in final Group I match with top spot in the group to be decided in Boston Stadium.

item.title: Haitians reflect on first World Cup experience in 52 years
item.description: Haitian diaspora reflects after Haiti participated in the World Cup for the first time in 52 years.

item.title: Venezuela earthquakes devastate country
item.description: Two back-to-back earthquakes have struck Venezuela, devastating infrastructure and sending panic through the streets.

item.title: Iran, Israel and the Bomb
item.description: How decades of sabotage and brinkmanship over Iran's nuclear programme erupted into the 2026 US-Israeli war on Iran.

item.title: For Haitians in the US, the pride and joy of the World Cup comes with fear
item.description: Haiti have come and gone at World Cup 2026, but the experience was about more than just football for its supporters.

item.title: Venezuela earthquakes: How will sanctions impact aid operations?
item.description: Financial sanctions are known to limit the flow of aid, but political influence is also a concern amid the devastation.

item.title: ‘We did regain control’: The Brexit voters with no regrets 10 years on
item.description: The UK may have squandered the freedoms it won, but leaving the EU was the right decision, say pro-Brexit Britons.
